message:
bd-103a: Fix agent status showing 'unknown' instead of actual state

- Add looksLikeIdle heuristic function to detect likely idle states when
  explicit prompt patterns don't match
- Add more Claude Code prompt patterns (bare >, numbered prompts, border)
- Heuristic checks: short last lines (<20 chars), prompt character endings,
  and common done indicators
- Reduces false unknown states in dashboard status display
- Add comprehensive tests for looksLikeIdle and determineState functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
